surface_water.label: Surface Water Bodies
surface_water.description: JRC water bodies detected ≥50% of the time (1984–present)

water_occurrence.label: Water Occurrence Frequency
water_occurrence.description: How often each pixel is classified as water. Darker = more permanent.

water_proximity.label: Proximity to Water (≤500m)
water_proximity.description: Green = within 500m of a water body, Red = farther away.
